The '''''General Dodonna''''' was a [[USV-5 Modified Landspeeder|USV-5 Modified]] [[Landspeeder/Legends|Landspeeder]] owned by [[Hilbrun]]'s family and crew. It was parked in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Marked with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] symbols, the speeder was named after [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] of the Rebel Alliance. The speeder had a metallic blue [[Color/Legends|color]], with purple markings. Its doors were welded shut.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''General Dodonna'' and Hilbrun's crew appear in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

The television series ''[[Wikipedia:The Dukes of Hazzard|The Dukes of Hazzard]]'' prominently featured [[Wikipedia:General Lee (car)|a vehicle]] that also is named after a notable general, is painted with symbols aligning with that general's allegiance, and has doors that are welded shut.  Other parallels with the TV show are Hilbrun's companions [[Eyleen]] and [[Tiomvo]] having originally been respectively named Daezii Mae and Kleetuz, variations on the show's characters [[Wikipedia:Daisy Duke|Daisy]] and Cletus; and Eyleen sporting Daisy Duke's [[Wikipedia:Daisy Dukes|iconic shorts]].
